Scripts.OnLoad: self:EnableMouseWheel(true) self:RegisterForClicks("LeftButtonUp", "RightButtonUp") self:SetNormalTexture('Interface\\AddOns\\WoWTools_Chinese\\Source\\WoWtools.tga') self:GetNormalTexture():ClearAllPoints() self:GetNormalTexture():SetPoint('CENTER') self:GetNormalTexture():SetSize(12,12) function self:settings() local enabled= not WoWToolsChineseSave[self.value] if enabled then self:SetNormalAtlas('MonkUI-LightOrb') else self:SetNormalTexture('Interface\\AddOns\\WoWTools_Chinese\\Source\\WoWtools.tga') end self:GetNormalTexture():SetAlpha((not enabled or self:IsMouseOver()) and 1 or 0.5) end
Scripts.OnMouseDown: WoWToolsChineseSave[self.value]= not WoWToolsChineseSave[self.value] and true or nil if self.callback then if type[self.callback]=='function' then self.callback() else local callback= _G[self.callback] if callback then callback() end end end self:settings()
Scripts.OnLeave: ResetCursor() GameTooltip_Hide() if self.set_alpha then self:set_alpha() elseif self.alpha then self:SetAlpha(self:IsMouseOver() and 1 or self.alpha) elseif not self.callback then self:settings() end
Scripts.OnEnter: GameTooltip:SetOwner(self, self.owner or 'ANCHOR_LEFT') GameTooltip_SetTitle(GameTooltip, '|TInterface\\AddOns\\WoWTools_Chinese\\Source\\WoWtools.tga:0|t|cffff00ffWoW|r|cff00ff00Tools|r_|cff28a3ffChinese|r') if type(self.tooltip)=='function' then self:tooltip(GameTooltip) elseif self.tooltip then GameTooltip:AddLine(GameTooltip, self.tooltip, NORMAL_FONT_COLOR:GetRGB()) else GameTooltip:AddLine('需要刷新') end GameTooltip:Show() if self.set_alpha then self:set_alpha() elseif self.alpha then self:SetAlpha(self:IsMouseOver() and 1 or self.alpha) else self:settings() end
